inputs.label: Project Width
inputs.businessContext: Width of the finished crochet project in centimeters.

businessContext_i18n.en: Width of the finished crochet project in centimeters.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bitmiş tığ işi projesinin santimetre cinsinden genişliği.
businessContext_i18n.de: Breite des fertigen Häkelprojekts in Zentimetern.

inputs.label: Project Height
inputs.businessContext: Height of the finished crochet project in centimeters.

businessContext_i18n.en: Height of the finished crochet project in centimeters.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bitmiş tığ işi projesinin santimetre cinsinden yüksekliği.
businessContext_i18n.de: Höhe des fertigen Häkelprojekts in Zentimetern.

inputs.label: Swatch Width
inputs.businessContext: Width of the gauge swatch made with the same stitch and yarn as the project.

businessContext_i18n.en: Width of the gauge swatch made with the same stitch and yarn as the project.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Projeyle aynı ilmek ve iplik kullanılarak yapılan ölçü numunesinin genişliği.
businessContext_i18n.de: Breite der Maschenprobe, die mit dem gleichen Muster und Garn wie das Projekt gehäkelt wurde.

inputs.label: Swatch Weight
inputs.businessContext: Weight of the dry gauge swatch in grams.

businessContext_i18n.en: Weight of the dry gauge swatch in grams.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kuru ölçü numunesinin gram cinsinden ağırlığı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gewicht der trockenen Maschenprobe in Gramm.

inputs.label: Skein Weight
inputs.businessContext: Net weight of one full skein of yarn in grams.

businessContext_i18n.en: Net weight of one full skein of yarn in grams.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir tam yumak ipliğin gram cinsinden net ağırlığı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Nettogewicht eines vollen Garnknäuels in Gramm.

inputs.label: Skein Length
inputs.businessContext: Length of yarn per skein in meters, for estimating total yarn length needed.

businessContext_i18n.en: Length of yarn per skein in meters, for estimating total yarn length needed.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Toplam iplik uzunluğunu tahmin etmek için yumak başına metre cinsinden iplik uzunluğu.
businessContext_i18n.de: Länge des Garns pro Knäuel in Metern, zur Schätzung der benötigten Gesamtgarnlänge.

inputs.label: Cost per Skein
inputs.businessContext: Purchase price per skein of yarn in currency unit.

businessContext_i18n.en: Purchase price per skein of yarn in currency unit.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Para birimi cinsinden yumak başına satın alma fiyatı.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
